reviews.review_text: Clean tidy and friendly what more could you ask for

Beautiful little quiet park, very clean.
Will definitely stay here again

Great location.  We had a drive thru caravan site which was large to fit our 226ft van and RAM 2500.  Clean facilities and friendly staff.   Loved the visit on Friday nights of the wood oven pizzas.  Very delicious.   Thanks
Friendly and helpful staff,clean and spacious amenities.Easy check- in after hours.Great place to stay and relax
Really nice spot, great clean laundry, quiet, and felt very safe traveling by myself, and the front desk woman was super kind
Had a great camping stay! Lovely staff - friendly and helpful. Amenities were great. Everything you need :)
Right on the beach... great caravan park. Has all the services you would expect..

Decent location, on the shore. Sites aren't very esthetically pleasing, and our neighbours, family of 4 just ran their sullige straight onto the ground so you're essentially walking years of other people's mess from the dirt outside straight into your caravan. Listened to the most violent vomiting we'd ever heard and did receive an entertaining show from a van across the road one night. The grounds maintenance is substandard with dirt and debris strewn all over the roads, need a backpack blower to easily keep it clean, I'd be out of business if I presented grounds like this to paying customers, it's just messy. Toilets were clean. It's your standard run-of-the mill park really, nothing fancy
Awesome
Popped in for an overnight stay and ended up staying 3 nights. Great quiet spot, good facilities
Everything was clean and tidy the staff helpful and accommodating walking distance to town which has all that you need
Great location, caravan park was good, town and area great, had a pleasant stay.
Super clean bathrooms & laundry, staff very friendly & helpful.
Great park, very friendly and welcoming staff

Room was clean and tidy and keys easily available for a late checkin.
Vicky was great to deal with the late changes to the booking requirements.
Rooms were clean, staff were nice and very helpful, good location and had a lovely stay cheers

An enjoyable and comfortable stay . Very attentive and friendly staff. We had a minor problem with hot water which was solved extremely promptly.
Lovely foreshore walking pathway and street art trail worthwhile.
Tumby Bay Caravan park is an excellent place to stay. Amenities were very clean and the staff ( Vicki) very friendly and helpful. Would definitely recommend a stay here.

Great location |Friendly staff |Well maintained caravan park |Amenities are clean and well kept love the music in the loos |Large sites for  caravans .. tent sites good too |We are staying for 3 nights |Sites are nice and flat for tent |Little coffee van was only a short walk |Camp Kitchen well supplied  |Disabled shower available |Laundry |Thank you |Thank you
Top spot.
Good location to town and beach. Our site was dusty but clean of mess. Small park. Clean toilets etc

We had a great stay at this park. Yes it doesn’t have all of the stand out facilities but you don’t always need that. Our kids were disappointed there wasn’t a bouncy pillow but this just encouraged them to make their own fun, just like we had to back in the day. The lady in the front office was brilliant to deal with and was always helpful. It’s a 15 minute walk along the esplanade to the main centre where the amazing bakery is located. We did emphasised that we had a large van and were given a drive through site right across from our friends. We were in between both bathrooms/camp kitchens which was handy if we needed to use them instead of using our own toilet in the van. Overall, I would stay again as it was on the cheaper end and right on the beach.

Tumby Bay Caravan Park is fabulous.
The sites are spacious, the amenities are modern and clean and the grounds are meticulously maintained.
Being school holidays, the park was full, mainly with young families which was really quite lovely.
Location wise, the park is right on the water, with a lovely walking/bike path into town.
The 2 pubs in town serve great food, too.
Friday nights, a pop up pizza van provides wood fired delicious pizzas.
And, an added bonus is a wine tasting experience with Gardeners Winery… a local vineyard.
Reception was friendly and professional.
Reception itself is wheel stocked, including wine and locally distilled gin.
Loved our time in Tumby Bay.
A nice Caravan park, just over 1 k from town centre, clean amenities, friendly helpful staff, opposite beach  front.
A lovely place to stay. Staff at the Park very friendly and helpful.

We really enjoyed our stay. Last minute booking and Vicki was very accommodating. Spacious sites. Shade. Bathroom block very clean with gorgeous classic tiles. Grassed areas for family cricket.  BBQ immaculately cleaned too. 👍👍👍
Place to be if down the Eyre
NO HOT WATER IN THE SHOWER!!

We love Tumby Bay and your park compliments your town in every way,my husband and. I visit every year and you never disappoint,   thank you for another wonderful visit with us not wanting to leave .........caravan sites are large, amenities are spotlessly clean, gardens are well maintained, staff so friendly. Right at the water's edge, easy stroll into town for groceries, coffee or dining, both hotels have wonderful food. Mosaic trail is lovely and the wall art is something else. Thank you Tumby Bay Caravan Park and as Arnie says " I'LL BE BACK "

This is a lovely little park, so close to the water with all the amenities you need.
A variety of sites are available, mainly gravel based. The amenities are a little older but spotless.
Washing - $7 with large newish machines.
Excellent park right on the forshore with easy access sites, clean amenities and friendly staff
It's right next to ocean. It's quite. Site was good. Amenities good.
Great staff and nice caravan park close to beach and 1 km walk to shops an 2 pubs. Good IGA and other services.

Got to give it to the gentleman that booked us in. It was an hr over closing time and my partner and I had a long trip. He had one available, very spacious cabin. The shower was nice, the towels thick and fluffy, very beautiful to dry yourself with, all the cabin was clean and well maintained and only a short walk down to the beach, the takeaway shop and pub. The atmosphere in the park was very friendly and also the people that we met that work there. It was definitely worth taking the detour to stop for the night for a rest before the rest of our journey.  The bed was very comfortable. Also the cabin contained 1 queen bed and 2 bunk beds. They were all well made with clean linen and it was a cozy warm sleep  Great cabin to house 6 so definitely a cabin for a family or friends that are traveling and a great price. Everything worked well in the cabin we stayed in. Thank you to the lovely gentleman that answered the phone and gave us a nice warm cabin and bed to sleep for the night.

Great little park in a lovely town
Facilities clean  and well presented
Good value for money
Clean amenities. Good size sites. Friendly operators. Bit of a walk to shops and pub

Cabin was dirty. Kettle full of pasty calcium deposits un usable. Toaster needs replacing.  Bathroom tiny too small to get around. Not cleaned properly. Towells were old and scratchy. Holes in the Screen. Just awful accomodation. Paid $190 for one nite. 2 adults one little dog. Very disappointing.
Wonder host 🌹
The caravan park excellent its quiet and clean the amenities block was very clean will stay here next time we come this way

What a lovely caravan park. We only stayed one night but could easily have stayed longer. The amenities are beautifully clean. The sites are large and the manager placed us in a drive through site (he was lovely and friendly). The caravan park is about 1km from the town centre with a walk/cycle path. A very easy walk to the pub for dinner.  Highly recommend staying here.
Great place, clean, great location, friendly staff. Big sites. Highly recommended.
Roos top tenter. Very clean, beautifully maintained caravan park. Wake up to a glorious sunrise. Lovely, friendly township. Delicious, well priced fish and chips from takeaway shop.
Great location, friendly service.  standard facilities.

Very clean and quiet.
Great showers and amenities.
Walking distance to shops.

Great little park with friendly onsite manager. Amenities are older style but they are clean and showers were hot and lots of water pressure. Large sites and walking distance to town and Jetty. Lots of painted wall murals around the town and great food at the Jetty Pub.

Friendly,  clean park. Beautiful views. Walk way along beach. Pet friendly.
Close to Port Lincoln main shopping precinct but the local store has most things.

Great spot to stay for 4 days.

The staff are nice and friendly and the park is well maintained.
Would highly recommend this place to stop over.
Great park by the sea . Lovely town , Awesome showers !

Fantastic caravan park right on the water, very clean and green.
Helpful management goes above and beyond.
Can.t get much closer to the bay without being in it.very quiet and clean park to be in.highly recommend 👌
Fantastic, clean and friendly park. We loved our stay and happy to recommend. Thank you
We stopped into Tumby Bay caravan park for 3 nights in July. Fantastic location. Easy to walk into town, bakery, Pub and pier
Such a friendly and beautiful place to visit.
Stayed on a powered site nice spot with 15 minute walking track into the town nice clean facilities friendly and welcoming staff.

Stayed several days here and enjoyed the local sights. Large sites for big rigs. Oysters were large and tasty and could be brought from local suppliers at $12 a dozen (natural). Added our own toppings.
Great park, wonderful location, very helpful staff, will come back

Great spot, overlooking the bay. Amenities clean, neat and tidy. Laundry great and usual price. Coins required. 40 minutes to Port Lincoln. Walk into the Town Centre about 20 minutes from the park along the foreshore.  Peak season would be very full due to the location and ease of access. Flat drive thru sites.. Staff lovely and friendly.

A great caravan park with plenty of powered sites and a few ensuite sites also. There are cabins if you need. The park is very close to the beach and access to the walking trail is well signposted. A walk into town and the jetty is about one & half kilometres. They have a Pizza night ($15 for a large) on Friday nights. Very welcoming staff and happy to help in any way to make your stay comfortable.
Awesome place. Caravan park was so well kept  Staff very friendly and welcoming  , park was very well laid out  nice and clean. Thanks again 😀😀😀😀

The staff do an exceptional job around the grounds.
The cleanliness of their business is up another level.
They are also very friendly and easy to get along with

Picture perfect caravan site
Clean and well managed
Large easy to park sites
Pizza & wine tasting Friday night
A gem of a place

Very disappointed with my cabin,
Not like the photos on the website,very dated and not clean.
Clumps of hair everywhere.
Furniture was really grotty. Picture of under couch cushions.

We were looking for a short break while travelling the Eyre Peninsula and came across this caravan park and booked a powered site for two nights. Hosts were fantastic, good quality drinking water, clean and roomy showers, great location to beach and jetty, generous sites. Just what we needed. We plan to come back when next this way. Good value too as G’day Parks members.

Stayed at Tumby Bay Caravan Park for 10 nights May 2025. Sites were large with plenty of room with awning out & car parked right beside us. Being mid north the ground cover was a small pebble stone, but comfortable to walk on, grass too difficult to maintain due to summer heat and the amount of water it would require. Amenities were ample and very clean. CP easy to drive in and out of, office had a few supplies if you ran out of necessary items. Would highly recommend this Park and Tumby Bay, loved our stay & if we travel this way would definitely come to this CP.
Linda Papps, Adelaide SA.
We stayed in a powered site, $36 per night, with G’Day discounts, spacious sites, staff very accommodating, thank you
A very clean caravan park,  large areas for your van and car.
Great little park in a great location 👍

Peaceful, well serviced caravan park
Lovely large drive throughs for larger rig. Walk to the beach
Stay and play it’s worth it
Nice clean park and friendly staff with easy access.

We loved our stay at Tumby Bay Caravan Park. Our site was a large gravel site and all camp facilities were just a few seconds walk away. The park is beautifully maintained and although the amenities are a little dated they are very clean and well cared for. It’s clear that the owners/staff take great pride in their park. We had a wonderfully relaxing and peaceful stay and it was an easy walk of just over a kilometre into town and the park is right on the beach which is ideal for fishing and boating. We wouldn’t hesitate to return to this fabulous little park!

The park facilities were immaculate, but our camping spot was disappointing due to its proximity to a sewage tank, which often left a foul odor, and its sandy, dirt terrain, which desperately needed some grass.
Good walk along the beach.
Perfect if you fish. ( which we don't)

Our stay in the caravan park was wonderful. The staff are amazing and extremely helpful and knowledgeable. Sites are a good size and the amenities while older are kept clean and tidy. Can't wait to come back.

We stayed on caravan site was nice and level , was a gravel site but we don't care.   The pizza and Wine tasting on Friday night was an added bonus.  Great park, lovely town .  Thanks for making our stay great 👍
Had a lovely stay in powered site, nice and close to beach for lovely walks, little bit out of the township
Will always recommend and return great park

This place is lovely, situated on the outskirts of town directly on the foreshore so no restrictions with access to the beach which is great for swimming or fishing.  It’s only a short walk to the main foreshore where the restaurants and bars, the jetty and local shops

We loved our stay at Tumby Bay Caravan Park. Our site was a large gravel site and all camp facilities were just a few seconds walk away. The park is beautifully maintained and although the amenities are a little dated they are very clean and well-maintained. It’s clear that the owners/staff take great pride in their park. We had a wonderfully relaxing and peaceful stay and it was an easy walk of just over a kilometre into town and the park is right on the beach which is ideal for fishing and boating. We wouldn’t hesitate to return to this fabulous little park!

Had a powered site for 2 nights, very near showers, toilets, camp kitchen.
Friendly very welcoming staff. Excellent facilities, would stay again
Ann & Ken

We had a wonderful caravan site with plenty of room to move, not cramped in like a lot of caravan sites. All of the staff were extremely friendly and park was spotless a real credit to everyone that works there. Would recommend to anyone to stay
Our cabin was very neat and tidy. Beds were very comfy. Definitely met our needs for the weekend.

Had us booked into a site we couldn’t fit in so a quick visit to the office and was sorted out straight away. Facilities were very good and clean and the grounds were very neat. No hesitation recommending to anyone.
Even the permanent resident wd a great bloke to have a chat to. A1
Nice spot to stay for a couple of days friendly staff

Had a beautiful stay in one of the motel rooms. Had everything we needed, clean and comfortable. Plenty going on within walking distance or short drive of the caravan and in a great location on the beach! Super friendly and helpful staff who called instantly after my query regarding making a booking with G’Day vouchers, and even with readjusting the booking when I booked for the wrong weekend!
Really appreciate all their hospitality
The only issue we had was with the shower in the bathroom, due to no lip on the shower and less fall in the floor, the water leaked out into the whole bathroom which made clothes and other items sitting in the room wet, and mop provided to clean up after each shower. Once we learnt was easy to deal with and other than that the whole stay was extremely enjoyable. Highly recommend!

We were looking for some where to stay long weekend SA. I called Tumby Park Caravan Park. Kaye answered and was very helpful and accomating. We were after a non powered site, but unfortunately we couldn't fit and Kaye but us on a powered site no problems. Very friendly staff. Clean amenities.
Nice costal caravan park
This park was amazing with their care and support for people with a disability. Facilities were fantastic. Sites were large and easily accessed with most drive through.

Tumby Bay Caravan park as a great park. Right by the ocean, just walk across the road. Pizza sales and wine tasting Friday night. Clean amenities. Helpful and friendly staff. We had a powered site which was a good size.
We had our caravan at Tumby Bay CP for 2 nights. We have stayed at many G’Day parks and the hosts here were so friendly & inviting. Great laundry & camp kitchen was so clean. Thank you for having us
Great park neat and tidy would stay again
A lovely caravan park by the water. Kay was lovely at reception and the amenities were very clean and spacious. Wish we could’ve stayed longer!
Fantastic location, very clean. Was visiting friends
Stayed 1 night will definitely be back.pet friendly, clean amenities,

Nice quiet caravan park, Friday was pizza and wine tasting night from local businesses, pity we were not told on check in, found out when they were packing up.

Amenities block is good, toilets clean but showers in the men’s block needs the floors to be given a good scrub.

Would stay again as overall good.

Beautiful location,  well run park, friendly staff, very clean and spacious amenities.  We enjoyed the wine tasting and pizza night. The town folk are super friendly and the murals painted on the buildings in town are exceptional and tasteful. Very dog friendly town and our dog was welcomed everywhere. We will definitely return.
We stayed on an ensuite site, which was very nice, the sites are large and the staff at the park are so friendly and helpful, I will be staying here again next time I am travelling through this area
Great time. Fire whip cracking action. Local singer, pizza and wine tasting. Hot showers. Large sites. Lovely Lady in office. Will recommend.
Lovely atmosphere and place to stay thanks to the wonderful friendly and caring staff.  Gardens are looking lovely and all facilities are kept clean and tidy. Thank you, we'll be back
Great spot, very relaxing with friendly people.
Good place to stop clean quite family frendly
30m from tent
Great management. Lovely and peaceful caravan park. Toilets and showers very clean although a bit old. First place we stayed at in South Australia that the WiFi actually worked🙂
Great location easy to walk to shops , Jetty etc.

Lovely Caravan park. Staff incredibly helpful and accomodating. Amenities clean and well kept. Great facilities. Located close to town aswell if you need anything which was handy. Would highly recommend.
A bit average, but ok

We had a great stay! We booked for two nights and stayed for four and even contemplated another night. Very typical seaside country town caravan park. Clean amenities blocks (there’s two which is awesome), with the local AM station playing, very dangerous for getting caught singing in the shower to a good Madonna or Suzi Quatro number! Sites are good size, mainly gravel but some spots of lawn and lots of shade. Great outdoor camp kitchen with another indoor kitchen with tables, chairs and TV. We had minimal interaction with Managers but when we did, it  was friendly, welcoming and helpful. It is a little hike into the town centre but there is a bitumen walking/bike trail all the way, with seating, toilets and information plaques along the way, so easy to do with kids on bikes. Could not fault the park, definitely recommend ad we will definitely visit again!
Very clean and tidy

Great quiet safe park. Right beside the water and close to town and fishing. Happily left mhome  and went exploring all over the place. This town/village is really remarkable and so pretty. Gardens and town art
. Would certainly stay at this van park again.

it's great that Tumby Caravan pk advertises with Travel Auctions each time i've seen the Auction i've bid for this as i love to visit the area n surounds n this place is so well situated to visit all the other towns around it from Coffin Bay to Cleve this pk is perfect in every way so clean n tidy n staff r so friendly u can't go wrong by staying @ the Tumby Bay Caravan pk don't miss it on your travels the town n pk r beautiful

We booked in and were arriving late. The office rang to arrange book in after hour. And on noticing we were only staying one night with our caravan arranged a site for us where we didn't need to unhook.
Relaxing, great location. Clean and functional amenities, we will be back!
Awesome stay. Great fishing

Great caravan park,lots of room on each site.
Great walk/bike path to cafes and jetty,great little town highly recommended
Very nice caravan park well worth the stay.
Helpful friendly staff,  good amenities,  clean toilets and showers.
Lovely caravan park on the edge of town. Very spacious sites
Very friendly and helpful when we arrived without a prior booking and accommodated us in a large site for our caravan. Great location, beautiful spot. Would definitely recommend and come back again.

Tumby Bay Caravan Park has friendly hosts and a prime waterside location. The facilities are clean, and the showers are nice. Tumby Bay itself is a pleasant, quiet little town with charming seaside appeal. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay. Thank you!

What a lovely caravan park, caters for all kinds of traveller's. Walking distance to town and jetty.  Beautiful location, clean and well maintained. Owners are very accommodating. Would highly recommend to anyone looking for a lovely little town to stay at.

Stay away.
Travelling for two weeks. $140 for a cabin the most expensive cabin on the trip. By the way you're out by 9am.
Credit card surcharge. Businesses are allowed to recover costs - these costs are in the order of 1%.
A 3% credit card surcharge is rude and illegal. For heavens sake structure your costs and charges so you don't say to some customers "I don't like the way you are going to pay me so I'm going to charge you more". There is a small cost but build it in to your pricing.
Best avoided.

Don't bother. ||$140 for a cabin and by the way you're out by 9am.||Businesses are allowed to recover costs with a credit card surcharge. Costs are of the order of 1%.||A 3% credit card surcharge is rude and illegal. For heavens sake set up your business to cover all costs without saying to some of your customers "I don't like the way you are going to pay me, so I'm going to charge you more. " A small amount of money but incredibly poor customer relations. ||Stay away.
Enjoyed this park as well as being close to town and the position is great .
A great place to stay . Close to shopping and pubs. Well cared for and clean amenities. Jetty now open to the public.
Base for exploring.  Lovely helpful staff on hand. Park is a short walk to the town centre. Options for take away good.  Can't walk without shoes on beach as Razor fish settled.

Came to this park for one night and ended up staying h for three.  Lovely park with water views, large sites, clean and spacious showers and toilets and really friendly staff.
Easy walk to town with great shops and pubs and friendly helpful staff.
Just Loved it and would definitely return.
Lovely spot. Friendly & clean
Very good park and it too has drive through sites.
Very comfortable setting, good atmosphere, great food choices and our food was excellent. Good service, friendly staff. Hotel faces the ocean. Definitely worth a visit. Prices very reasonable.
Such a lovely park - spotless amenities, good size sites, beach front, easy walk to town and friendly, informative staff

It was overnight.
Come back other time.
What a great park very very clean and very friendly we really enjoyed our stay
Very nice CP make sure you check out the silo art

This park is great!! Staff are absolutely wonderful! Soo helpful and we had a few requests and nothing was a problem.
Park is super clean and tidy, well priced and in a great location.
Thanks for having us!
Stay here every time we are in tumby always a great stay
A pleasant Caravan Park with large sites and many drive through sites. Good amenities.  Two minute walk to the waterfront. 15 minutes walk shops, pub, take away.  First time here, won't be my last.

We stayed on a powered site. Staff very friendly but I think owners are skimping. No detergent or cloths in kitchen and wifi extremely slow. Very disappointed. I hope that they
improve.

We stayed in a powered drive through site. Thank goodness we arrived when the park was empty otherwise we would have struggled to get in BIG time. We do have a large van and did advise this upon booking. The sites are one on top of the other. We again were lucky when leaving as many had already left otherwise we would not have got out without asking people to move vehicles etc. The park was clean and the showers were nice and hot.
Beautiful Caravan park large sites great amenities friendly staff.I recommend this park to anyone doing the eyre peninsula.
Not much grass..but ok..nice park ruined by the trailer trash in 74?? Permanents ruin parks...and this one was a doosey. Would give 5 stars but for them.
Nice caravan park easy walk to shops

Simple but nice. Great staff.
Super close to the beach.
Great caravan park facilities in Tumby Bay. Right on the beach. Can't ask for more than that.
Great location,  clean park
Great location
Good location, cabins are a touch dated but they'll keep you warm and dry. Some sites are grassy, some are gravel. Good dump point.

Great caravan park in a beautiful location. Staff were really welcoming and helpful. Sites were spacious and well laid out. Facilities were spotless. I would happily recommend this park to all. Especially families,  the kids were all having a great time playing in the park as it wasn't a large park and it felt safe.

We just loved Tumby Bay, we could have stayed there longer. Right on the beach with lots of walk tracks and things to see. Great facilities and flat sites.

Hopefully the jetty will be fixed soon but the art trail in the town is fabulous! The silo art was so joyful and we could just feel that so much care had been taken in the town to create a lovely welcoming feel for tourists. We found everyone we came across who worked in the various shops very helpful too.
Had powered site with ensuite. Very clean. Enjoyed our stay

What a wonderful stay we have had at this caravan park. We are visiting SA from WA and were so impressed with this stop. The park has a great location, the amenities and camp kitchen were spotless. Lots of room and quiet at night. Staff were so friendly they made us feel really welcome. Thank you guys for having us! 😊
Good short stay the weather wasn’t too bad as thought be more stormy due to the forecast just a bit of rain though the day , staff were lovely and accommodating. Merry Christmas everyone there
What a great little park plenty room and nice flat sites, music in amenities is a great touch and very clean, highly recommend
Very clean and tidy Caravan Park. So quiet. Easy walk to the beach. Will return

We arrived in Tumby Bay not looking to stay, but spoke to the lady in the Caravan Park Office.  Decided to stay total of 5 nights and used the park as a base to do day trips.
The powered sites were a great size.
The amenities were huge and always very clean (the showers were fabulous). The park itself was very well looked after and the location was perfect right on the waterfront and walking distance to the town.
This park has so many wonderful things going for it.
Would definitely stay if we travel through here again.
Enjoyed our stay.
Lovely waterfront caravan park. Very friendly staff.
Great place, great location, and friendly service. Great place to visit.

Booked a little cabin for myself and niece for two nights. Cabin was reasonably priced given it was school holidays. Very clean and well appointed. Staff were super friendly, grounds well kept and green. Great location. Short walk to cafe for brekky, shops and pub for dinner. We had a ball. Thank you
Great park  but pity town jetty        closed especially if you like fishing would have stayed a few more days if opened
Such a beautiful place! Very clean. Thank you. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We stayed in a “motel” room which was lined up at the back, in a corner, against the fence with a front view of a small bitumen road and the back of a cabin in the next row in front.  It was a depressing setting for a depressing room.  It wasn’t a bad size and and had a bit of a kitchenette which was good.  The bed was comfortable with fresh crisp linen.  It was clean and had plenty of hot water.  If that’s all you need, that’s fine.  |But the bathroom basin was so minuscule that you could hardly get  |your hands in it and it was squashed into a corner.  Nowhere to store anything except the floor.  The fridge was likewise squashed into a corner with the door opening to the wall so it was a real struggle to use.  Everything was old and dated.  The taps were a struggle to turn on and off.|The place is not walkable to shops or anything but it is opposite the sea, not that you would know from this room.|We would recommend paying more and getting something elsewhere.
Loved this park, we will be back. Drive through sites, lots of shade, camp kitchens excellent as were the amenities. Staff super friendly.
Park is wonderfully maintained. Good size sites. Amenities excellent.
Quite spot
Nice town and caravan park. Well maintained. Good walks along the bay.
Fantastic time there
Great caravan park, very friendly and obliging staff. Sites are really good esp for larger vans. Shop at the office well stocked. Highly recommend.
Powered site only .very nice managers and  a well run park - they were very dog friendly and reasonable priced

Lovely caravan park in a good location. The staff at the park are friendly and always willing to help. We had an ensuite power site which was so convenient. Loved Tumby Bay. Made to feel so welcome by all the local people. The pub with the red roof is a great place for a meal. Thanks Tumby Bay Caravan Park.

The towns laundromat is closed due to a fire since April 2023.
A pitty the caravan park could not assist us.

We have been so lucky so far in our trip to WA to have stayed in lovely caravan parks and Tumby Bay was great too. Booking in was easy and staff friendly.  We extended our stay. The facilities were clean and easily accessible.  The shower stall was roomy and water hot.
Right on the bay, nice flat sites, super clean amenities, walk to town, super dog friendly

Great  location an easy walk to shops and Hotels.
Friendly and helpful staff.
Fantastic nothing else to say but Fantastic well worth a visit peeps 😀
Great little park, nice clean amenities,  tidy park right on the shore, staff are friendly we will definitely be back.
Nice, clean and grassy powered site. Amenities were clean and showers were very nice. Would stay again, shame the jetty was closed though
Great caravan park
Just over night stay in caravan
